shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a glowing invitation envelope — Arc's invite-only access strategy made visual.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a glowing invitation envelope — Arc's invite-only access strategy made visual.
assets.prompt: Arc Browser's Invite-Only Launch | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding an oversized invitation envelope with a wax seal on a cream background. The envelope glows subtly, suggesting it contains something valuable. Hatch's expression is slightly teasing — the invite is real, but the product is still becoming. No speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at Arc's unusual browser design with a waitlist queue behind it.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at Arc's unusual browser design with a waitlist queue behind it.
assets.prompt: Arc Browser's Invite-Only Launch | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at a browser with a distinctly unusual sidebar navigation — tabs on the left instead of the top, clearly different from Chrome. Behind the browser, a queue of small user figures waits. The browser glows; the queue looks patient but expectant. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch tracing Arc's invite chain mechanic — how scarcity propagated through social networks.
assets.caption: Hatch tracing Arc's invite chain mechanic — how scarcity propagated through social networks.
assets.prompt: Arc Browser's Invite-Only Launch | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at an invite chain diagram: one user icon at the top with three invite arrows going to three more user icons, each of which has arrows going to two more. The chain fans out like a tree. Hatch is pointing at the first arrow — the origin of the chain. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch holding the promise (invite) and the delivery (product) — the two halves of manufactured scarcity.
assets.caption: Hatch holding the promise (invite) and the delivery (product) — the two halves of manufactured scarcity.
assets.prompt: Arc Browser's Invite-Only Launch | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose holding an invitation envelope in one hand and a product icon in the other. The envelope is lighter — the promise. The product icon is weighted — the delivery. Hatch's expression is thoughtful: both matter. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker.
